source: FY2026 official: Army HRC Sep 2025, MARADMIN 526/25, Navy CNRC, Air Force.com, CG FY2026
note: Maximum achievable through stacking. Actual amounts depend on enlistment length, ASVAB, and recruiter allocation. Tranche amounts here use simulator-reachable milestones: boot_grad, soi_grad, first_unit, first_duty, sqt_grad.

milestone_legend.boot_grad: Within 30 days of basic training graduation (Quick Ship + initial EB)
milestone_legend.first_unit: Arrival at first operational unit (remainder + spread)
milestone_legend.first_duty: After tech school + first duty station arrival (AF + CG)
milestone_legend.sqt_grad: After SEAL Qualification Training (Navy SEAL only)

army_11b.title: Infantryman

payment_milestones.note: Ranger Option 40 + remainder at first unit

army_11b.note: Broadest SOF on-ramp. Most SFAS candidates come from 11B. Ranger bonus +$20K if Option 40.

army_13f.title: Fire Support / JTAC
army_13f.note: Ranger Regiment actively recruits 13F. Most SOF-valuable non-infantry MOS.

army_18x.title: Special Forces Candidate
army_18x.note: Arabic/Korean/Russian = +$30-45K language bonus. ~60% wash at SFAS.

army_19k.title: M1 Armor Crewman
army_19k.note: Highest advertised Army combat arms EB in FY2026.

usmc_0311.title: Rifleman
usmc_0311.note: USMC FY2026 = ONE bonus per enlistee. $15K via QW (add 2 years to contract).

usmc_0321.title: Recon Marine
usmc_0321.note: $50K lateral move kicker available at retention (FY2027).

usmc_0372.title: Marine Raider
usmc_0372.note: No initial EB. Must serve 3+ yrs as 03-series. $50K retention kicker at 84mo.

navy_seal.title: Navy SEAL

payment_milestones.note: Paid AFTER SQT graduation, NOT at boot camp

navy_seal.note: Only ~9.5% of SEAL contracts earn a Trident. EBSR paid after SQT only.

navy_swcc.title: SWCC

payment_milestones.note: After Charlie Phase (sim uses sqt_grad milestone)

navy_swcc.note: EBSR $30K = DOUBLE the SEAL rate. Higher bonus, lower attrition.

af_pj.title: Pararescue (PJ)

payment_milestones.note: 50% at first duty station / Maroon Beret pinned
Remaining 50% spread, paid at AFSOC unit assignment

af_pj.note: 50% at first duty, rest spread. SNCO retention SRB up to $125K.

cg_msrt.title: MSRT
cg_msrt.note: NO MSRT-specific bonus in FY2026. Internal selection 3-4 yrs after enlistment.

cg_ast.title: Aviation Survival Tech

payment_milestones.note: Critical rating EB after AST A-school

cg_ast.note: Critical rating EB stacked up to $75K CG cap.

stacking: Navy SO: EBSR $15K + EBPST $15K + EBSHP $5K + LRP $65K + EBHS $5K = $140K
Army 18X: EB $42K + Quick Ship $10K + Language $45K + LRP $65K = $162K
Army 19K: $47.5K — highest advertised Army combat arms FY2026
Air Force AFSWC: $40K enlist + $125K retention SRB = $165K career potential
Marines: ONE bonus only — choose highest (QW $15K for +2 yr contract)
payment_timing: Navy SO: paid AFTER SQT graduation, not at boot
Navy SB: paid after Charlie Phase of SWCC training
Navy EOD/ND: after respective A-school graduation
Air Force: 50% at first duty station, rest spread
Army: 50% within 30 days of AIT graduation, 50% at contract midpoint
Marines: at SOI or first permanent duty station
retention_premiums: Air Force SW SNCOs (PJ/CCT/TACP/SR): $50-125K to re-up 3-5 yrs
Navy SEAL E-9 (26-28 yrs): up to $100K retention contract
Marines FY2027: Raiders/Recon/EOD $50K lateral move kicker
Army cyber (780th MI Bde): up to $81K for 5-year reenlistment
